title: Settings
hideAmountsDescription: Mask all monetary values for privacy
localOnlyDescription: Data is stored on this device only
deleteAllDataMessage: This will permanently delete all your local budget data. This cannot be undone.
disconnectMessage: Disconnect from this server? Local data will be cleared.
customSymbolHint: Custom Symbol overrides the default symbol for display. Leave empty to use the standard symbol.
experimentalFeaturesWarning: Experimental features are incomplete and may cause unexpected behavior or data loss. They are synced across all your devices. Use at your own risk.
